# Dev Learning Archaeologist

> Forensic git-history learning diagnostic for AI-assisted developers.

Dev Learning Archaeologist is an ICM specialist folder that turns a repository's git history into an evidence-backed learning report. It helps developers who code with AI understand what they learned, where they are stuck, and what to study next.

## Use cases
- AI-assisted developer learning diagnostics
- Git-history archaeology
- Commit-backed learning reports
- Repository behavior analysis
- Claude Code learning retrospectives
- Evidence-backed study plans

## Key paths
- `README.md`: public overview and quick start
- `identity.md`: specialist identity and purpose
- `rules.md`: 5-phase forensic analysis pipeline
- `reference/`: schemas, signal heuristics, report spec, and enrichment docs
- `examples.md`: example interactions

## Keywords
developer learning diagnostic, git history analysis, software archaeology, AI coding learning, Claude Code retrospective, repository analysis, commit history report, ICM specialist, evidence-backed study plan, codebase archaeology.
